device: Bluetooth blood pressure monitor — FDA Class II
notes: Clean approval. Hypertension management. All conditions met, 30-day monitoring, care plan signed, 42 min interactive communication.

device: Continuous glucose monitor — FDA cleared
notes: DENY expected. No physician order on file. Only 14 days of data collected — below the 16-day minimum for 99454.

device: Pulse oximeter and ECG patch — FDA approved
notes: DENY expected. Care plan not documented in EHR. Interactive communication only 5 min — below 20-min threshold for 99457.

device: Connected weight scale — FDA Class II
notes: NEEDS_REVIEW. CHF management. Two 99458 billed (max allowed is 2 additional per month). 65 min total interactive time supports the billing volume.

device: Consumer smartwatch — not FDA cleared
notes: DENY expected. Device is a consumer wearable not FDA-cleared. G89.29 (chronic pain) may not meet RPM chronic condition criteria.

device: Connected blood pressure cuff — FDA 510(k) cleared
notes: APPROVE expected. CKD Stage 3. Borderline case — exactly 16 days monitoring (minimum for 99454). All other requirements met.

device: Connected blood pressure cuff — FDA cleared
notes: DENY expected. CKD Stage 4. Monitoring only 15 days — one short of the 16-day minimum required for 99454 billing.

device: Cardiac rhythm monitor — FDA Class II
notes: DENY expected. Paroxysmal AFib. Patient consent not documented — required before initiating RPM enrollment.

device: Connected weight scale and CGM — both FDA cleared
notes: DENY expected. Patient is a Skilled Nursing Facility resident — RPM is bundled into SNF payment and cannot be billed separately.

device: Smart scale and blood pressure monitor — FDA Class II
notes: APPROVE expected. Morbid obesity with hypertension. New enrollment — 99453 (setup) billed alongside 99454 and 99457. All conditions met.

device: Connected weight scale — FDA Class II
notes: DENY expected. CHF. 99458 billed without a preceding 99457 in the same period — 99458 cannot be billed as a standalone code.

device: Blood pressure monitor — FDA Class II
notes: DENY expected. Z00.00 is routine general exam — not a chronic condition. RPM requires an established chronic condition diagnosis.

device: Cardiac monitor and CGM — both FDA cleared
notes: APPROVE expected. High-risk patient: CAD, T2DM, hypertension. Multi-device monitoring, 48 min interactive time, all documentation in order.

device: Blood pressure monitor — FDA Class II
notes: DENY expected. 99453 (device setup) billed twice for the same patient. Setup is a one-time code per device per patient.

device: Blood pressure monitor — FDA Class II
notes: DENY expected. Interactive communication only 18 min — 99457 requires a minimum of 20 minutes of interactive time per 30-day period.

device: Pulse oximeter — FDA 510(k) cleared
notes: NEEDS_REVIEW. COPD. Care plan present but not co-signed by supervising physician — CNS ordered independently. Supervision requirements may apply.

device: Weight scale — FDA Class II
notes: NEEDS_REVIEW. CHF + CKD. Device only transmits weekly (not daily). Some policies require daily data availability for 99454 — transmission frequency may fall short.

device: Blood pressure monitor — FDA Class II
notes: NEEDS_REVIEW. Hypertension. RPM interactive time billed same day as a telehealth E&M visit — overlap in time counting may occur depending on payer policy.

device: Blood pressure monitor and CGM — FDA cleared
notes: DENY expected. Three 99458 codes billed in one month — CMS allows a maximum of two 99458 per 30-day period (totaling no more than 3 units with 99457).

device: Cardiac monitor, weight scale, CGM — all FDA Class II
notes: APPROVE expected. Complex multi-comorbidity patient: CAD, CHF, T2DM, CKD, HTN. New enrollment with setup (99453). 31-day monitoring, 44 min interactive time. Full documentation. Model high-risk RPM case.
